enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Short Title and Commencement
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Digital
Banking Channels Authorisation) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Digital Banking Channels Authorisation) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Effective Date
These Directions shall come into effect from January 01, 2026.
enriched_requirements.object: January 01, 2026

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Applicability
The provisions of these Directions shall be applicable to Local Area Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
enriched_requirements.object: Area Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
4.1 In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the following definitions
shall be applicable:

4.2 All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank
of India Act, 1934 and rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory
modification or re-enactment thereto, or Glossary of terms published by the Reserve
Bank or as used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 and rules / regulati

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Policies and Procedures
Banks shall put in place comprehensive policy(ies) for all digital banking channels
keeping in account all statutory and regulatory requirements (including on
management of liquidity and operational risks in digital banking scenario).
enriched_requirements.object: policy(ies) for all digital banking channels keeping in account all statutory and regulatory requirements (including on man

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
6.2 The banks commencing view only digital banking channel(s), from date of
applicability of these Directions, shall intimate the Department of Regulation, Reserve
Bank of India (through the PRAVAAH portal) along with a copy of the 'Gap Assessment
and Internal Controls Adequacy' (GAICA) Report as prescribed in para 7.1(e)(i) below
within thirty days from the decision to launch the facility with the approval of bank
board.
enriched_requirements.object: Regulation, Reserve Bank of India (through the PRAVAAH portal) along with a copy of the 'Gap Assessment and Internal Contro

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The process shall be subject to scrutiny as deemed fit by the supervisors.
enriched_requirements.object: as deemed fit by the supervisors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
7.1 Banks shall require prior approval of the Reserve Bank for launching transactional
banking facility.
enriched_requirements.object: the Reserve Bank for launching transactional banking facility

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Subject to fulfilment of the eligibility criteria as enumerated below,
banks may apply to the Department of Regulation, Reserve Bank of India (through the
PRAVAAH portal) for launch of transactional banking facility, along with the approval
of bank board and other necessary supporting documents.
enriched_requirements.object: of Regulation, Reserve Bank of India (through the PRAVAAH portal) for launch of transactional banking facility, along with the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
applicant bank shall submit detailed report indicating the expected expenditure (on
set up, maintenance, and upgradation) along with availability of funds for offering
the proposed facility on an ongoing basis.
enriched_requirements.object: the expected expenditure (on set up, maintenance, and upgradation) along with availability of funds for offering the

conditions:
if any),
technology proposed to be adopted
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the report shall also include the
details of cost-benefit analysis, third-party technology service providers (if any),
technology proposed to be adopted, and availability of skilled personnel to manage
the operations / oversee the outsourcing partners' operations.
enriched_requirements.object: of cost-benefit analysis, third-party technology service providers (if any), technology proposed to be adopted, and availabil

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This shall be assessed through the
following:
i.
enriched_requirements.object: following: i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The report shall be certified by (third party) CERT-In
empaneled auditor(s).
enriched_requirements.object: party) CERT-In empaneled auditor(s)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If a bank had received approval for a particular digital
banking channel (like mobile banking) before the date of applicability of these
Directions, it shall ensure compliance to the eligibility criteria as detailed in para 7.1(a)
to (d) above before launching any other digital banking channel.
enriched_requirements.object: eligibility criteria as detailed in para 7

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the GAICA
Report, certified by (third party) CERT-In empanelled auditor(s), addressing the
specific requirement for the new proposed channels shall be sent to the Department
of Regulation, Reserve Bank of India (through the PRAVAAH portal) with the approval
of bank board within thirty days from the decision to launch the facility.
enriched_requirements.object: Department of Regulation, Reserve Bank of India (through the PRAVAAH portal) with the approval of bank board within thirty days from th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The process
shall be subject to scrutiny as deemed fit by the supervisors.
enriched_requirements.object: as deemed fit by the supervisors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The following instructions shall be applicable for banks offering digital banking
services:
(1) Guidelines on Outsourcing of Information Technology Services as specified in
Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Managing Risks in Outsourcing)
Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: offering digital banking services: (1) Guidelines on Outsourcing of Information Technology Services as specified in Reserve Ba

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Chapter IV - General Guidelines
All banks offering digital banking services, regardless of type of facility, shall comply
with the directions contained in this chapter on a continuous basis.
enriched_requirements.object: contained in this chapter on a continuous basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Compliance
Banks shall ensure continuous adherence to the following in conduct of their digital
banking operations:
enriched_requirements.object: the following in conduct of their digital banking operations:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
10.1 Banks shall obtain explicit consent from the customer for registering/de-
registering (in case of existing customers) for digital banking services and the consent
shall be duly recorded/documented.
enriched_requirements.object: the customer for registering/de- registering (in case of existing customers) for digital banking services and the consent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It shall also be clearly indicated that SMS/email
alerts will be sent to the mobile number/email of the customer registered with the bank
for operations, both financial and non-financial, in their account(s).
enriched_requirements.object: that SMS/email alerts will be sent to the mobile number/email of the customer registered with the bank for operations, both

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
10.2 Multiple channels for registration of these services may be provided to minimize
the need for branch visits and application processing time.
enriched_requirements.object: the need for branch visits and application processing time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
10.3 For registration, banks shall provide the terms and conditions in clear and simple
language (preferably in English, Hindi, and the local language) which is easily
comprehensible to the customer.
enriched_requirements.object: conditions in clear and simple language (preferably in English, Hindi, and the local language) which is easily comprehensible to

conditions:
if any) to be
levied under specific circumstances
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These shall provide details of charges (if any) to be
levied under specific circumstances, timeframe and process to initiate stop-payment
instructions, helpdesk details, grievance redressal, and risks, responsibilities, and
liabilities of customers.
enriched_requirements.object: (if any) to be levied under specific circumstances, timeframe and process to initiate stop-payment instructions, helpdesk d

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
10.4 Banks shall comply with the guidelines on customer protection including limiting
of liability in unauthorised electronic banking transactions as provided in Reserve Bank
of India (Local Area Banks - Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025 (as
amended from time to time), sending of alerts (through SMS, email, etc.), and ensure
that the terms and conditions provided to customers are compliant with the
instructions.
enriched_requirements.object: on customer protection including limiting of liability in unauthorised electronic banking transactions as provided in Reser

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
10.5 Banks shall not make it mandatory for the customer to opt for any digital banking
channel to avail any other banking facility like debit cards.
enriched_requirements.object: the customer to opt for any digital banking channel to avail any other banking facility like debit cards

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Customers can avail, if they
so desire, one or more services under digital banking channels, however, there shall
be no compulsory bundling of services by the bank.
enriched_requirements.object: of services by the bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The choice to avail any digital
banking facility shall lie solely with the customer.
enriched_requirements.object: customer

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
10.6 Banks offering mobile banking service (other than through mobile applications)
must ensure that customers across mobile network operators can avail of the service,
i.e., the service shall be network independent.

10.7 Banks shall put in place appropriate risk mitigation measures in accordance with
their policies like transaction limit (per transaction, daily, weekly, monthly), transaction
velocity limit, fraud checks, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: risk mitigation measures in accordance with their policies like transaction limit (per transaction, daily, weekly, monthly),

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It is clarified that
wherever specific requirements have been prescribed by the Reserve Bank or
respective payment system operators through which the transaction is routed or
switched (for example, NPCI, Card networks like VISA, Mastercard, etc.), the
requirements that are stricter of the two shall be applicable.

Banks shall ensure
<image>
continuous compliance with instructions issued by the Reserve Bank in this regard as
amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: with instructions issued by the Reserve Bank in this regard as amended from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
10.8 Post customer login, third-party products and services, shall not be displayed on
banks' digital banking channels except as specifically permitted by the Reserve Bank
from time to time in terms of the applicable instructions contained in Reserve Bank of
India (Local Area Banks - Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025, and other related
instructions, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: digital banking channels except as specifically permitted by the Reserve Bank from time to time in terms of the applicable inst

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of
these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

12.2 Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further,
the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
enriched_requirements.object: affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued,
or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if
those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Application of other laws not barred
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Interpretations
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
